raw_ir:modifier_reentrancy.airDrop.1.raw:
Node[1] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: tokenBalance[msg.sender] += 20
		IRs:
			REF_0(uint256) -> tokenBalance[msg.sender]
			REF_0(-> tokenBalance) = REF_0 + 20

raw_ir:modifier_reentrancy.airDrop.2.raw:
Node[2] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: hasNoBalance()
		IRs:
			MODIFIER_CALL, ModifierEntrancy.hasNoBalance()()

raw_ir:modifier_reentrancy.airDrop.3.raw:
Node[3] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: supportsToken()
		IRs:
			MODIFIER_CALL, ModifierEntrancy.supportsToken()()



Contract Bank

raw_ir:modifier_reentrancy.supportsToken.raw:
Node[1] Type: IF
		Expression: ! hasBeenCalled
		IRs:
			TMP_12 = UnaryType.BANG hasBeenCalled 
			CONDITION TMP_12

Node[2] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: hasBeenCalled = true
		IRs:
			hasBeenCalled(bool) := True(bool)

Node[3] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: ModifierEntrancy(msg.sender).airDrop()
		IRs:
			TMP_13 = CONVERT msg.sender to ModifierEntrancy
			HIGH_LEVEL_CALL, dest:TMP_13(ModifierEntrancy), function:airDrop, arguments:[]

Node[5] Type: RETURN
		Expression: (keccak256()(abi.encodePacked(Nu Token)))
		IRs:
			TMP_15(bytes) = SOLIDITY_CALL abi.encodePacked()(Nu Token)
			TMP_16(bytes32) = SOLIDITY_CALL keccak256()(TMP_15)
			RETURN TMP_16

raw_ir:modifier_reentrancy.call.1.raw:
Node[1] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: ModifierEntrancy(token).airDrop()
		IRs:
			TMP_17 = CONVERT token to ModifierEntrancy
			HIGH_LEVEL_CALL, dest:TMP_17(ModifierEntrancy), function:airDrop, arguments:[]

			tokenBalance_4(mapping(address => uint256)) := ϕ(['tokenBalance_3'])

Node[0] Type: ENTRY_POINT
		SSA IRs:
			hasBeenCalled_1(bool) := ϕ(['hasBeenCalled_2', 'hasBeenCalled_0'])

Node[1] Type: IF
		Expression: ! hasBeenCalled
		SSA IRs:
			TMP_12 = UnaryType.BANG hasBeenCalled_1 
			CONDITION TMP_12

Node[2] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: hasBeenCalled = true
		SSA IRs:
			hasBeenCalled_2(bool) := True(bool)

Node[3] Type: EXPRESSION
		Expression: ModifierEntrancy(msg.sender).airDrop()
		SSA IRs:
			TMP_13 = CONVERT msg.sender to ModifierEntrancy
			HIGH_LEVEL_CALL, dest:TMP_13(ModifierEntrancy), function:airDrop, arguments:[]

Node[5] Type: RETURN
		Expression: (keccak256()(abi.encodePacked(Nu Token)))
		SSA IRs:
			TMP_15(bytes) = SOLIDITY_CALL abi.encodePacked()(Nu Token)
			TMP_16(bytes32) = SOLIDITY_CALL keccak256()(TMP_15)
			RETURN TMP_16
